AIiDocumentationBlockElement - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents a block-level documentation element.
AIiDocumentationCodeBlock - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents a standalone code block.
AIiDocumentationContainerElement - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents a block-level documentation element that can contain child blocks.
AIiDocumentationDocument - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents the root of a documentation element tree.
AIiDocumentationElement - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents a common renderer-neutral documentation element.
AIiDocumentationInlineCode - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents inline code inside textual content.
AIiDocumentationInlineElement - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents an inline documentation element.
AIiDocumentationLineBreak - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents an explicit line break inside inline content.
AIiDocumentationLink - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents a non-semantic inline link.
AIiDocumentationParagraph - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents a paragraph with ordered inline content.
AIiDocumentationReference - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents a semantic inline reference to another documented object.
AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents a renderer-neutral target of a semantic documentation reference.
AIiDocumentationSection - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents a hierarchical documentation section.
AIiDocumentationTable - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents a tabular block element.
AIiDocumentationTableCell - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents a cell in a documentation table row.
AIiDocumentationTableColumn - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents metadata of a documentation table column.
AIiDocumentationTableRow - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents a row in a documentation table.
AIiDocumentationText - Interface in eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Represents plain inline text.

E

eu.algites.lib.common.documentation - package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation
Renderer-neutral documentation element model.

G

getCode() - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationCodeBlock
Returns the code block content.
getCode() - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationInlineCode
Returns the inline code text.
getColumnDescription() - Method in class eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIcDocumentationTableColumn
 
getColumnDescription() - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationTableColumn
Returns the column description.
getColumnId() - Method in class eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIcDocumentationTableCell
 
getColumnId() - Method in class eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIcDocumentationTableColumn
 
getColumnId() - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationTableCell
Returns the identifier of the column this cell belongs to.
getColumnId() - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationTableColumn
Returns the stable table-local column identifier.
getColumns() - Method in class eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIcDocumentationTable
 
getColumns() - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationTable
Returns table columns in their rendering order.
getColumnTitle() - Method in class eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIcDocumentationTableColumn
 
getColumnTitle() - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationTableColumn
Returns the human-readable column title.
getDisplayName() - Method in class eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIcDocumentationReferenceTarget
 
getDisplayName() - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget
Returns the human-readable target display name.
getDocumentDescription() - Method in class eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIcDocumentationDocument
 
getDocumentDescription() - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationDocument
Returns the document description.
getDocumentTitle() - Method in class eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIcDocumentationDocument
 
getDocumentTitle() - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationDocument
Returns the human-readable document title.
getElementId() - Method in class eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIcDocumentationElement
 
getElementId() - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationElement
Returns the stable identifier of this documentation element.

getInlineElements() - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationParagraph
Returns paragraph inline elements in their rendering order.
getInlineElements() - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationTableCell
Returns cell inline elements in their rendering order.

getLabel() - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationReference
Returns the human-readable reference label.
getLanguageId() - Method in class eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIcDocumentationCodeBlock

Returns the language identifier of this code block.
getMetadata() - Method in class eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIcDocumentationElement
 
getMetadata() - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationElement
Returns metadata associated with this documentation element.

getMetadataValue(String) - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationElement

getQualifiedName() - Method in class eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIcDocumentationReferenceTarget

getReferenceTarget() - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationReference

getRows() - Method in class eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIcDocumentationTable
 
getRows() - Method in interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationTable
